requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug (GSA / IEC 62368-1 basis)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——230V/50Hz/G型插头（GSA / IEC 62368-1基础）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——230V/50Hz/G型插頭（GSA / IEC 62368-1基礎）

summary.en: Ghana operates at 230 V / 50 Hz. BS 1363 Type G (British-style 3-pin square) is the most common plug in urban Ghana; Type D (BS 546 large round 3-pin) is also in use. Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices must be safe for 230 V / 50 Hz operation and must be fitted with or supplied with a Type G plug for Ghanaian consumers. GSA adopts IEC / ISO standards as GS standards; the applicable standard for audio/video and IT equipment is IEC 62368-1 (or GS equivalent). CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by GSA.
summary.zh: 加纳采用230V/50Hz供电。BS 1363 G型（英式三方扁脚）是加纳城市地区最常见的插头；D型（BS 546大型圆柱三芯）也在使用中。市电供电的无线及物联网设备须满足230V/50Hz工作的安全要求，并须为加纳消费者配备或附带G型插头。GSA以IEC/ISO标准为基础制定GS标准；适用于音视频及IT设备的标准为IEC 62368-1（或相应GS等效标准）。GSA不承认CCC电气安全认证。
summary.zht: 加納採用230V/50Hz供電。BS 1363 G型（英式三方扁腳）是加納城市地區最常見的插頭；D型（BS 546大型圓柱三芯）也在使用中。市電供電的無線及物聯網裝置須滿足230V/50Hz工作的安全要求，並須為加納消費者配備或附帶G型插頭。GSA以IEC/ISO標準為基礎制定GS標準；適用於音視頻及IT設備的標準為IEC 62368-1（或相應GS等效標準）。GSA不承認CCC電氣安全認證。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment safety — GSA GS basis)
Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) GS standards for electrical safety

summary.en: Chinese devices are safety-certified under CCC mandatory certification using GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 basis with Chinese deviations) or GB 62368-1 (IEC 62368-1 basis) for IT and AV equipment. China mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz. Standard Chinese plug types are Type A (two flat pins) and Type I (oblique flat pins) per GB 2099.1 — neither is compatible with Ghana Type G sockets. CCC covers 220 V operation; devices must be evaluated for 230 V if not rated 100-240 V.
summary.zh: 中国设备通过CCC强制认证，依据GB 4943.1（IEC 60950-1基础，含中国特有偏差）或GB 62368-1（IEC 62368-1基础）对IT和音视频设备进行安全认证。中国电网为220V/50Hz。中国标准插头类型依据GB 2099.1为A型（两扁插）和I型（斜扁插）——两者均与加纳G型插座不兼容。CCC覆盖220V工作；若产品未标注100-240V宽电压，须针对230V重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國設備通過CCC強制認證，依據GB 4943.1（IEC 60950-1基礎，含中國特有偏差）或GB 62368-1（IEC 62368-1基礎）對IT和音視頻設備進行安全認證。中國電網為220V/50Hz。中國標準插頭類型依據GB 2099.1為A型（兩扁插）和I型（斜扁插）——兩者均與加納G型插座不相容。CCC覆蓋220V工作；若產品未標注100-240V寬電壓，須針對230V重新評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety — IEC 60950-1 basis with CN deviations)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — electrical safety scope
GB 2099.1 Type A/I plug (220 V / 50 Hz)

gap.en: Partial gap: voltage difference is small (220 V CN vs 230 V GH) and power supplies rated 100-240 V require no adaptation. The material plug gap is significant: Chinese Type A / Type I plugs are incompatible with Ghana Type G sockets — devices must be supplied with a BS 1363 Type G plug for the Ghanaian market. CCC electrical safety certification is not accepted by GSA; safety test data to IEC 62368-1 (GB 4943.1 basis) may serve as a technical input but must be re-declared against the applicable GS standard.
gap.zh: 部分差距：电压差异较小（中国220V vs 加纳230V），标注100-240V的电源适配器无需适配。插头差距较为显著：中国A型/I型插头与加纳G型插座不兼容——面向加纳市场的设备须配备BS 1363 G型插头。GSA不接受CCC电气安全认证；基于IEC 62368-1（GB 4943.1）的安全测试数据可作为技术输入，但须重新声明符合适用GS标准。
gap.zht: 部分差距：電壓差異較小（中國220V vs 加納230V），標注100-240V的電源適配器無需適配。插頭差距較為顯著：中國A型/I型插頭與加納G型插座不相容——面向加納市場的裝置須配備BS 1363 G型插頭。GSA不接受CCC電氣安全認證；基於IEC 62368-1（GB 4943.1）的安全測試數據可作為技術輸入，但須重新聲明符合適用GS標準。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety certification is not accepted by GSA. Products for the Ghanaian market must be fitted with a BS 1363 Type G plug and safety-assessed under the applicable GS / IEC 62368-1 standard. Devices rated 100-240 V require no voltage adaptation but plug compatibility is mandatory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GSA不接受中国CCC电气安全认证。面向加纳市场的产品须安装BS 1363 G型插头，并依据适用GS / IEC 62368-1标准进行安全评估。标注100-240V的设备无需电压适配，但插头兼容性为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GSA不接受中國CCC電氣安全認證。面向加納市場的產品須安裝BS 1363 G型插頭，並依據適用GS / IEC 62368-1標準進行安全評估。標注100-240V的裝置無需電壓適配，但插頭相容性為強制要求。
